pinyin: Tā jīntiān de chuāndài hěn zhěngjié.
english: Her dress today is very neat and tidy.

sentence: 厨房里的器具都洗干净了。
pinyin: Chúfáng lǐ de qìjù dōu xǐ gānjìng le.
english: All the kitchen utensils have been washed clean.

pinyin: Shān shàng céngcéng tītián hěn zhuàngguān.
english: The layer upon layer of terraced fields on the mountain is spectacular.

sentence: 物理课上讲到了力场的概念。
pinyin: Wùlǐ kè shàng jiǎngdào le lìchǎng de gàiniàn.
english: The concept of a force field was covered in physics class.

sentence: 这种过度焦虑已经是病态了。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng guòdù jiāolǜ yǐjīng shì bìngtài le.
english: This kind of excessive anxiety has already become an abnormal state.
